title: Stop chasing perfect setups. Here's why you're inconsistent instead.
description: The real reasons traders struggle with consistency have nothing to do with finding better setups. Here's what actually matters for profitable trading.
script: I used to blame my setups. Always hunting new strategies. Never my fault, right? Lost account after account. Same pattern every time. Different strategy, same results. Then I realized the truth. It wasn't the setups. It was my execution. Fixed my discipline first. Now I'm consistently profitable. Follow R2F Trading for more tips.
